div1.entryFree: Undertaker, one who takes a business upon himself, charges himself with sth.: for Cassio, let me be his u. Oth. IV, 1, 224 (let me take charge of him, dispatch him. German: ich will ihn übernehmen. cf. Undertake 1 b). Absolutely, == one who makes any thing his own business, a meddler: nay, if you be an u., I am for you, Tw. III, 4, 349.
